# GitHub Copilot Instructions

> **📋 For complete project instructions, see [`../.ai/instructions.md`](../.ai/instructions.md)**

This file configures GitHub Copilot for the Dotfiler project. All comprehensive documentation is centralized in `.ai/instructions.md`.

## Essential Information

Dotfiler is a zero-magic, portable dotfiles management system. Key principles:
- **Auto-detection over hardcoded paths**
- **Preserve all existing functionality**
- **Follow established patterns** (verbosity logging, emoji feedback, safety checks)
- **Never use git commands** unless explicitly requested

For detailed information on:
- Architecture and file organization → See `.ai/instructions.md`
- Development workflows and commands → See `.ai/instructions.md`
- Project conventions and patterns → See `.ai/instructions.md`
- Common tasks and debugging → See `.ai/instructions.md`
